text.title: Shadow Handover Session Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for `HandoverSessionRecord` — pre-agreed task list + per-task receiver-driven verdict + gap log + two-party sign-off.

list.item: `gap_log[*].doc_link == null` AND no open action item recorded — violates `r3-written-gap-log`.

example.note: receiver_drove=false but verdict=unaided (impossible); engineers empty; sign-off unsigned; gap log no doc link without action.
